name: White Potato

pros.title: very practical staple food
pros.explanation: Cheap, common, and easy to build meals around, which matters for a tuber category built on energy foods.

pros.title: can be fairly filling
pros.explanation: Especially when eaten in less processed forms.

pros.title: brings some useful potassium
pros.explanation: Not amazing, but enough to matter a bit in the category.

cons.title: glycemic behaviour is only middling
cons.explanation: Not as clean as the best tubers on the carb-behaviour axis.

cons.title: micronutrient return is fine rather than elite
cons.explanation: Strong enough to be respectable, not enough to be exceptional.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
